evals.prompt: I just cloned a Next.js monorepo with a PostgreSQL backend and dbt transformations. Can you scan the codebase and set up a prompt library in .claude/prompts/ that's adapted to our stack?
evals.expected_output: Should run codebase scan, detect Next.js + PostgreSQL + dbt stack, select relevant prompt categories (all of them in this case), adapt placeholders with project-specific values, and write adapted prompts to .claude/prompts/ with a README, INDEX, and project profile.

evals.prompt: Give me a code review prompt customized for this Python/FastAPI project with pytest tests.
evals.expected_output: Should read the software-development reference, find the code review template, detect Python/FastAPI/pytest from context, and output an adapted prompt with those values pre-filled while leaving task-specific placeholders (like {{YOUR_CODE}}) intact.

evals.prompt: We're setting up AI prompts for our team. We use React with TypeScript, Tailwind, and deploy to AWS with GitHub Actions. Can you generate the full prompt library for .github/copilot/prompts/?
evals.expected_output: Should build profile from stated stack, select UI development + software development + codebase research categories, adapt all templates with React/TypeScript/Tailwind/AWS/GitHub Actions values, write to .github/copilot/prompts/ with Copilot-specific integration notes in the README.
